positive: A vibrant, minimalist design featuring a stylized celestial map illustration. The main subject is a constellation of glowing, interconnected geometric stars and moons set against a deep midnight blue background. Stylistically, it should mimic elegant linework combined with soft gradient glows (art nouveau meets astronomical diagram). Compositionally, the map is centrally focused and framed by soft, circular celestial elements (crescents, stylized planets). Lighting should be ethereal and magical, with the stars emitting a subtle, bright glow that creates high contrast against the deep background. Color palette must be limited to navy blue, deep violet, celestial gold, and creamy white. The overall aesthetic must be highly scalable, clean, and suitable for direct transfer onto clothing fabric. High resolution, intricate details, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, watermark, text, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy, gradient background (unless intentional)
